tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Always Something There To Remind Me

content:
[Intro]
[ch]B2[/ch]  [ch]D#m7[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]
[ch]B2[/ch]  [ch]D#m7[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]B2[/ch]            [ch]D#m7[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]E/F#[/ch]
  Sometimes a love won't let go.[/tab]
[tab][ch]B2[/ch]          [ch]D#m7[/ch]  [ch]G#m7[/ch]       [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]E/F#[/ch]  [ch]G#9/C[/ch]
  Hard as I try I know it shows.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]D#m7[/ch]    [ch]G#m7[/ch]  [ch]G#9/C[/ch]
    Ev'rybody's telling me,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                    [ch]D#m7[/ch]   [ch]G#m7[/ch]  [ch]G#9/C[/ch]
    You'll be over her eventually.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]    [ch]C#m7/B[/ch]      [ch]A#m7-5[/ch]        [ch]D#7+5+9[/ch]  [ch]D#7+5+9/G[/ch]   [ch]G#m7[/ch]   [ch]G#9sus[/ch]  [ch]G#[/ch]
    But how am I supposed to feel so       se  -  cure.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Db2[/ch]             [ch]Db[/ch]      [ch]DbM7[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]
When I keep wond'rin' who's holding Donna now?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]GbM9[/ch]                         [ch]Ab/Gb[/ch]   [ch]GbM9[/ch]
And I keep wond'rin' who's heart she's knocking around.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Ebm7[/ch]       [ch]Ab7[/ch]   [ch]Ebm7[/ch]      [ch]Ab7[/ch]        [ch]DbM7[/ch]  [ch]E6[/ch]  [ch]Ab9sus/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ab7[/ch]
There's nothing I wouldn't do to be in his shoes somehow.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]DbM7[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]      [ch]DbM7[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]
And I keep wond'rin' who's holding Donna now?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]GbM9[/ch]                [ch]Ab/Gb[/ch]   [ch]GbM9[/ch]
And I keep wond'rin' what magic can be found.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ebm7[/ch]        [ch]Ab7[/ch]  [ch]Ebm7[/ch]          [ch]Ab7[/ch]     [ch]Db2[/ch]  [ch]E2[/ch]   [ch]Gb7sus[/ch]
To turn me back to the one, who's holding Donna now.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]B2[/ch]            [ch]D#m7[/ch]   [ch]G#m7[/ch]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]E/F#[/ch]
  The letter started with goodbye.[/tab]
[tab][ch]B2[/ch]             [ch]D#m7[/ch]   [ch]G#m7[/ch]       [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]E/F#[/ch]  [ch]G#9/C[/ch]
  I've read it half a million times.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]D#m7[/ch]    [ch]G#m7[/ch]  [ch]G#9/C[/ch]
    Tell me this is just a dream,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                         [ch]D#m7[/ch]         [ch]G#m7[/ch]  [ch]G#9/C[/ch]
    When I wake up she'll be here next to me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]C#m7/B[/ch]          [ch]A#m7-5[/ch]      [ch]D#7+5+9[/ch]  [ch]D#7+5+9/G[/ch]   [ch]G#m7[/ch]   [ch]G#9sus[/ch]  [ch]G#[/ch]
     Tell me it will be just the way      it      was.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Db2[/ch]             [ch]Db[/ch]      [ch]DbM7[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]
When I keep wond'rin' who's holding Donna now?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]GbM9[/ch]                         [ch]Ab/Gb[/ch]   [ch]GbM9[/ch]
And I keep wond'rin' who's heart she's knocking around.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Ebm7[/ch]       [ch]Ab7[/ch]   [ch]Ebm7[/ch]      [ch]Ab7[/ch]         [ch]DbM7[/ch]  [ch]E6[/ch]  [ch]Ab9sus/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ab7[/ch]
There's nothing I wouldn't do to be in his shoes right now.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]DbM7[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]      [ch]DbM7[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]
And I keep wond'rin' who's holding Donna now?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]GbM9[/ch]                [ch]Ab/Gb[/ch]   [ch]GbM9[/ch]
And I keep wond'rin' what magic can be found.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ebm7[/ch]        [ch]Ab7[/ch]  [ch]Ebm7[/ch]          [ch]Ab7[/ch]      [ch]DbM7[/ch]  [ch]E2[/ch]  [ch]Ab9sus[/ch] [ch]Ab7[/ch]
To turn me back to the one, who's holding Donna now.[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Db2[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]DbM7[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]
[ch]GbM9[/ch]     [ch]Ab/Gb[/ch] [ch]GbM9[/ch]
[ch]Ebm7[/ch] [ch]Ab7[/ch] [ch]Ebm7[/ch] [ch]Ab7[/ch] [ch]Db2[/ch] [ch]Gb/Eb[/ch] [ch]Ab/F[/ch]

[tab][ch]Eb2[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]EbM7[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]AbM9[/ch]                         [ch]Bb/Ab[/ch]   [ch]AbM9[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]AbM9[/ch]             [ch]Bb/Ab[/ch]   [ch]AbM9[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]         [ch]Bb7[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]           [ch]Bb7[/ch]      [ch]EbM7[/ch]  [ch]Ab2/Gb[/ch]          [ch]Bb2/Ab[/ch]
To make me the one, who's holding Donna now,   I can't get Donna off my mind.[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]AbM9[/ch]                             [ch]Bb/Ab[/ch]   [ch]AbM9[/ch]
And I keep wond'rin' who's heart she's knocking around.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Fm7[/ch]        [ch]Bb7[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]       [ch]Bb7[/ch]         [ch]EbM7[/ch]  [ch]Ab2/Gb[/ch]  [ch]Bb2/Ab[/ch]
